summary: Plan-only classification: keep #76622 as the live canonical issue for the Telegram callback acknowledgement UX report. Keep #76975 related as the active contributor implementation path, but do not merge or close against it because required behavior proof is failing and the bot review identifies unresolved implementation/proof blockers.

actions.reason: #76622 is the best surviving canonical issue for this root cause and should remain open while the active PR path is refreshed or maintainer UX direction is decided.

#76975 is related to and intended to fix #76622, but it is not safe to treat as a merge candidate or fixed-by-candidate closeout path in this plan because required proof/checks and review-bot blockers remain unresolved.
